name: Fountaingrove Dental
tagline: Gentle, honest dentistry in the heart of Fountaingrove
seoDescription: Dr. Alec C. Nelson's Fountaingrove Dental in Santa Rosa offers general, family, and cosmetic dentistry — warm, no-pressure care with no upsells.
heroHeading: Comfortable, no-pressure dental care in Fountaingrove
heroSubheading: General, family, and cosmetic dentistry from Dr. Alec C. Nelson — a warm, friendly team and honest treatment plans, never upsells.
highlights: Founded in Santa Rosa in 1991; at the Fountaingrove Parkway location since 2005
General, family, and cosmetic dentistry under one roof
Honest, no-upsell approach patients consistently praise
Esthetic and cosmetic dentistry is Dr. Nelson's passion, with prevention at the core
Dr. Nelson earned his dental degree from Fairleigh Dickinson University in 1981
Warm, friendly staff in a clean, comfortable office
aboutBody: Dr. Alec C. Nelson earned his dental degree from Fairleigh Dickinson University in 1981. After fulfilling a Navy service obligation, he began practicing in 1985, opened his own Santa Rosa practice in 1991, and moved to the Fountaingrove Parkway location in 2005.

Esthetic and cosmetic dentistry is Dr. Nelson's passion, but he believes prevention is the key to a healthy, beautiful smile. He has continued to study with prominent specialists across the country throughout his career. Patients describe a warm, friendly team and an honest approach with no upsells and no pressure.

services.title: General & Family Dentistry
services.description: Routine cleanings, exams, and preventive care for the whole family in a comfortable, welcoming setting.

services.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
services.description: Esthetic and cosmetic treatments — Dr. Nelson's longtime passion — to help you put your best smile forward.

services.title: Teeth Whitening
services.description: Professional whitening to brighten your smile safely and effectively.

services.title: Crowns & Bridges
services.description: Restorative crowns and bridges to repair and rebuild damaged or missing teeth.

services.title: Preventive Care
services.description: A prevention-first philosophy: catching issues early to keep your teeth and gums healthy for the long term.

testimonials.quote: After a lifetime of OK dentists in strip malls that do average work with bored unresponsive employees, I am so glad I found Dr. Nelson! No upsells, no pushiness and the most warm, friendly staff EVER!
testimonials.author: Yelp reviewer

testimonials.quote: Comfortable and very clean office. All the staff and Dr. Nelson will listen and work with you.
testimonials.author: Yelp reviewer

notes: PRACTICE NAME CONFIRMED: Dr. Nelson's practice operated as 'Fountaingrove Dental' (fountaingrovedental.com, still live, returns 403 to automated fetch but resolves in search). CRITICAL OWNERSHIP CHANGE: In February 2024, Dr. Anthony Lieu (Blue Apple Dental Group) ACQUIRED Dr. Alec Nelson's practice and Dr. Nelson RETIRED. The practice at 855 Fountaingrove Pkwy Ste 100 now operates as 'Fountaingrove Dental Group' (fountaingrovedentalgroup.com), led by Dr. Lieu with associate Dr. Marcus Rice — same address and same phone (707) 546-2829. DO NOT SEND THIS DEMO BLINDLY: Dr. Alec Nelson is no longer practicing; an outreach email addressed to him about his website may be moot or should be re-targeted to Fountaingrove Dental Group / Dr. Lieu. VERIFIED FACTS (Dr. Nelson era): DMD/DDS from Fairleigh Dickinson University 1981; Navy obligation; began practicing 1985; opened own Santa Rosa practice 1991; moved to Fountaingrove Pkwy 2005; passion for esthetic/cosmetic dentistry, prevention-focused. RATINGS: Alec Nelson DDS = 4.5 stars on Yelp; Sharecare 3.7/5; Healthgrades 3 reviews. The CURRENT Fountaingrove Dental Group Yelp page shows 14 reviews; Chamber of Commerce lists 3.8 stars from 12 reviews. CURRENT FDG hours reported as Mon-Thu (one source 7:30am-4:00pm with midday break, another 8am-5:30pm) — left hours[] EMPTY because Nelson-era hours are unverified and current hours conflict across sources. SERVICES listed are general/family/cosmetic, whitening, crowns, bridges, prevention — verified for the practice but specific Nelson-era service menu not independently confirmed beyond general/cosmetic emphasis. Email doc855@sbcglobal.net unverified. Testimonials are REAL Yelp quotes for Dr. Nelson but attributed generically ('Yelp reviewer') because reviewer names were not captured. NO real photos confirmed as theirs (site blocks fetch) -> realPhotoUrls empty. SOURCES: Yelp (alec-nelson-dds-santa-rosa, fountaingrove-dental-group-santa-rosa), Healthgrades, fountaingrovedental.com/dr-alec-c-nelson, fountaingrovedentalgroup.com, Chamber of Commerce, BBB.
